mapper.insert: INSERT INTO appointments (coach_id, student_id, table_id, start_time, end_time, cost, status, create_time) VALUES (#{coachId}, #{studentId}, #{tableId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{cost}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE appointments SET
coach_id = #{coachId},
student_id = #{studentId},
table_id = #{tableId},
start_time = #{startTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
cost = #{cost},
status = #{status},
id = #{id} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE appointments SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM appointments WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT * FROM appointments WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY start_time DESC

SELECT * FROM appointments WHERE coach_id = #{coachId} AND ((start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time < #{endTime}) OR (end_time > #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime}) OR (start_time < #{startTime} AND end_time > #{endTime})) AND status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY start_time ASC

SELECT * FROM appointments WHERE table_id = #{tableId} AND ((start_time >= #{startTime} AND start_time < #{endTime}) OR (end_time > #{startTime} AND end_time <= #{endTime}) OR (start_time < #{startTime} AND end_time > #{endTime})) AND status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY start_time ASC
